revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Bg li]]

revision.comment: not used any more - to delete

revision.text: {{db-author}}

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Bg]] to [[Template:Bkg]]: To release "Bg" for possible use as shortcut to a Bulgarian language-icon template (cf [[:Category:Language icons]])
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Bkg]]

revision.comment: create template for facilitating background color
revision.text: {{{t}}} == Usage == {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out.

{{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out.

{{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[[sl:Predloga:Bg]] {{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[sl:Predloga:Bg]]

revision.comment: Robot - Speedily moving category Formatting templates to Wikipedia formatting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]].
revision.text: {{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[sl:Predloga:Bg]]

revision.comment: Robot: moving pages out of redirected category
revision.text: {{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[sl:Predloga:Bg]]

{{{t}}} == Usage == This template is used to create a background color, kind of like highlighting in [[Microsoft Word]]. {{bg|t=text|c=(hexadecimal) color}} Please see [[Web colors]] for a list of hexadecimal colors, and choose what you want. Note that simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. ==See also== * {{tl|Colors}} – background/text color (text in free span) * {{tl|TextColors}} – background/text color (text in block table) * {{tl|NestTextColors}} – background/text color (text in block div) * {{tl|bkg}} – background color (text in free span) * {{tl|bg}} – background color (text in free span) [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[pt:Predefinição:Bg]] [[sl:Predloga:Bg]]

{{{2}}} {{Documentation}}
{{{2}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Background color: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (between 700 and 1200 transclusions) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{{2}}} {{Documentation}}
{{{t|{{{2|}}}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: + - arz temporarily, bots will move it to Wikidata later
revision.text: {{{t|{{{2|}}}}}} {{Documentation}} [[arz:قالب:Background color]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/M777|M777]] ([[User talk:M777|talk]]) to last version by Lfdder
revision.text: {{{t|{{{2|}}}}}} {{Documentation}}

{{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Main other|{{Ensure AAA contrast ratio|base={{{c|{{{1|}}}}}}|other={{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}|category=[[Category:Articles using Template:Background color with invalid colour combination]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Add template other categorization, since most of these errors happen in navboxen. I hope this doesn't break anything.
revision.text: {{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Main other|{{Ensure AAA contrast ratio|base={{{c|{{{1|}}}}}}|other={{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}|category=[[Category:Articles using Template:Background color with invalid colour combination]]}}}}{{Template other|{{Ensure AAA contrast ratio|base={{{c|{{{1|}}}}}}|other={{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}|category=[[Category:Articles using Template:Background color with invalid colour combination]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Background color]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High risk template]] 3,383 transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Main other|{{Ensure AAA contrast ratio|base={{{c|{{{1|}}}}}}|other={{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}|category=[[Category:Articles using Template:Background color with invalid colour combination]]}}}}{{Template other|{{Ensure AAA contrast ratio|base={{{c|{{{1|}}}}}}|other={{{t|{{{2|}}}}}}|category=[[Category:Articles using Template:Background color with invalid colour combination]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Background color]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 2]]</noinclude>"

revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
